title: stelis malvina
intro: Stelis malvina, a species of orchid native to South America, is a type of terrestrial orchid characterized by its delicate white flowers and slender leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis malvina include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
